article_items.description: [HIGH] Billions spent and hypothetical returns: the AI boom explained with six charts Company : The Guardian Tech Summary : Expenditure is growing fast and consumer take-up accelerating. But alarm bells are sounding The race is very much on. Elon Musk’s SpaceX, which makes AI models as well as space rockets, announced last Link :
